'''dazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irremovably|irremovably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irremovably|irremovably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dazate|dazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dazatesher|dazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazatesherĂ«m|dazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dazatero|dazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dazateshĂ«|dazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazateshĂ«m|dazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidazatero|gokidazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidazateshĂ«|gokidazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazateshĂ«m|gokidazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godazankerom|godazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godazankeshĂ«|godazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godazankeshĂ«m|godazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godazankeya|godazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dazaterom|dazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazatemu|dazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dazateya|dazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidazaterom|gokidazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazatemu|gokidazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidazateya|gokidazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dazazate|dazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dazazatesher|dazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazazatesherĂ«m|dazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dazazatero|dazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dazazateshĂ«|dazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazazateshĂ«m|dazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidazazatero|gokidazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidazazateshĂ«|gokidazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazazateshĂ«m|gokidazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godazazankerom|godazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godazazankeshĂ«|godazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godazazankeshĂ«m|godazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godazazankeya|godazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dazazaterom|dazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazazatemu|dazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dazazateya|dazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidazazaterom|gokidazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazazatemu|gokidazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidazazateya|gokidazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠzĂŠte|dĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠzĂŠtesher|dĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠzĂŠtero|dĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzĂŠtero|gokidĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠzĂŠnkerom|godĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠzĂŠnkeya|godĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠzĂŠterom|dĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠzĂŠtemu|dĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠzĂŠteya|dĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzĂŠterom|gokidĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzĂŠteya|gokidĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafzafte|dafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafzaftesher|dafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafzaftesherĂ«m|dafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafzaftero|dafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafzafteshĂ«|dafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafzafteshĂ«m|dafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafzaftero|gokidafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafzafteshĂ«|gokidafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafzafteshĂ«m|gokidafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafzafnkerom|godafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafzafnkeshĂ«|godafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafzafnkeshĂ«m|godafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafzafnkeya|godafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafzafterom|dafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafzaftemu|dafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafzafteya|dafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafzafterom|gokidafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafzaftemu|gokidafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafzafteya|gokidafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
